name: Scout Protocol
description: A local-first agent coordination system — the Garage is where you query the network, send missions, and manage agent candidates.
purpose: Let Ernest explore and prototype the Scout Protocol interaction loop: send a mission via Walkie Talkie, receive deterministic mock candidates, and save them to the Whiteboard.
primaryActions: Save a candidate to the Whiteboard
welcomeScript: Welcome to the Scout Protocol Garage. This is a local prototype — all interactions are simulated. Send a mission to query the mock peer network and receive agent candidates.
suggestedPrompts: What is a Walkie Talkie query?
note: Local prototype only. All data is mock. No real network connections are made.
